## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content approvals and publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Approval Blocked:** A batch of content sent pre-Thanksgiving is awaiting final approval, halting the publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Meeting Rescheduled:** The sync with Dhruv was canceled; Katya will send an async update and propose moving the recurring meeting to the afternoon (PT) to improve attendance.](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

## Topics

### Content Approval Bottleneck

  - [The publishing cadence is blocked by the client's delayed approval of content.](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [**Awaiting Approval:**](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [A batch of \~5 pieces sent before Thanksgiving.](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [3 new pieces prepped by Nathalie.](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The client (Dhruv) is likely busy with internal launches and has a packed morning schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

### Meeting Rescheduling

  - [The sync was canceled after Dhruv confirmed a conflict.](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Move the recurring meeting to the afternoon (PT).](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [**Rationale:** An afternoon slot is expected to improve Dhruv's attendance, as it avoids his morning meeting conflicts.](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Impact:** This change is unlikely to affect other participants (e.g., Ada), who have previously attended meetings at this time.](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [Send an async update to Dhruv detailing the pending content approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [Propose moving the recurring sync to an afternoon slot (PT).](https://fathom.video/share/mot-7uyzNSsdAD7zRgkCzWuyFkQxoN1X?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
